title: Day of Week Enum
description: Use an enum to represent days of the week and print a message for a specific day.
problemStatement:
Enums make code readable! Define an `enum Day { Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday }`.

If a variable `today` is set to `Friday`, print `"It's almost the weekend!"`.

**Requirement:** Use an `if` statement to check the enum value.
hints: Enums start from 0 by default (Monday=0, Tuesday=1...).
You can compare them directly: `if (today == Friday)`.
